title: 국회, AI 규제 법안 논의 급물살
summary: 인공지능 기술의 급속한 발전에 따라 국회에서 AI 규제와 육성 방안을 두고 논의가 격화되고 있습니다.
content: The National Assembly has launched urgent discussions on AI regulation and development support. Several lawmakers are pushing for comprehensive legislation to address AI safety concerns. The proposed bill includes guidelines for AI development in critical sectors. Tech companies are urging balanced regulations to foster innovation. Consumer protection advocates emphasize the need for strict oversight. The government plans to establish a dedicated AI regulatory agency. International cooperation on AI standards is also being discussed. Public hearings will be held next month to gather expert opinions. The bill aims to position Korea as a global AI leader while ensuring safety. Opposition parties have expressed concerns about potential overregulation. The final vote is expected within the next quarter.
